title: Seating and Interior Assemblies
entry_mechanism: International automotive seating company establishing Saudi assembly with SABIC polymer materials supply
executive_summary:
Automotive seating and interior assemblies — seats, door panels, dashboard sub-assemblies, headliners — account for 15–20% of a vehicle's total manufacturing cost. They are manufactured using polyurethane foam, SABIC engineering plastics, fabric/leather, and steel frames — inputs that Saudi Arabia largely produces domestically. Node AU-2 targets Saudi assembly of automotive seating and interiors, combining SABIC's polymer materials advantage with international automotive seating companies seeking lower-cost Gulf manufacturing.

Saudi Arabia's automotive assembly programme (the full AU programme) creates a captive OEM demand for locally-produced seating and interior assemblies. The manufacturing processes (foam moulding, fabric cutting and sewing, assembly) are labour-intensive and suited to Saudi Arabia's manufacturing cost structure. The technical barriers are relatively low compared to other automotive components — this is an assembly-intensity play, not a precision manufacturing challenge.

companies.name: Lear Corporation
companies.rationale: Lear is the world's second-largest automotive seating manufacturer with emerging market JV experience.

companies.name: Adient (formerly Johnson Controls)
companies.rationale: Adient is the world's largest automotive seating company with active Middle East market presence.

companies.name: Faurecia (Forvia)
companies.rationale: Faurecia produces automotive interiors and seating with non-US European technology and active Gulf supply chain.

companies.name: Toyota Boshoku
companies.rationale: Toyota Boshoku produces automotive interiors and has international manufacturing JV experience.

companies.name: Yanfeng Automotive Interiors
companies.rationale: Yanfeng is the world's largest automotive interior supplier with competitive manufacturing costs.

partners.name: SABIC Automotive Materials
partners.current: Automotive polypropylene and engineering plastic supply; some foam precursors
partners.upgrade: SABIC automotive-grade polymer supply to Saudi seating manufacturer; SABIC equity in seating JV; Saudi vertically integrated polymer → seat assembly supply chain

partners.name: KAEC Automotive Zone
partners.upgrade: Saudi seating manufacturer as KAEC anchor automotive Tier 1 supplier; shared materials handling and logistics infrastructure

partners.name: TVTC Automotive Upholstery Training
partners.upgrade: Automotive seating assembly technician programme; foam moulding and sewing training; Saudi seating manufacturer operator pipeline

partners.name: Saudi OEM Assembly Programmes
partners.upgrade: Saudi-assembled vehicles specify Saudi-produced seating; localisation scorecard credit; Saudi seating as required local content
